steps.title: Identify what Gibson uses in his art
steps.content: The passage shows Gibson employing traditional Native art forms—beadwork, leather fringe, jingles, and dressmaking elements—in his punching bag decorations.

steps.title: Recognize which choice describes this approach
steps.content:
Choice A (‘He draws from traditional Native art forms to create his original works.’) states Gibson “draws from traditional Native art forms to create his original works,” which is precisely what the passage demonstrates.

The other choices either introduce unsupported influences, reverse the causal relationship between objects and inspiration or misidentify what he rejects—gender roles, not color or pattern expectations.

That confirms A is correct.
